name: The Lapsed Saints
specialty: A duo of skilled negotiators, navigating the treacherous Undercity with unparalleled finesse, often resolving conflicts that even the factions avoid.

members.name: Renata Blackthorn
members.note: A former Warden of Ash, her scarred face serves as a reminder of her past loyalty, fueling her determination to stay neutral in the Undercity's power struggles.

members.name: Eldric Ironfoot
members.note: A stout and silent member, Eldric is known for his impeccable instincts, honed by years spent navigating the labyrinthine Warrens.

visual: The Lapsed Saints stand out in the crowded Undercity. Renata, with her short, silver hair and a cloak of faded red, commands attention with her confident stride. Eldric, dressed in his worn leather armor and sporting a neatly trimmed beard, moves silently by her side, always on alert.
reputation_note: Though they're unaligned, The Lapsed Saints are respected by both the factions and the common folk of the Undercity. A word from Renata can bring peace where others fear to tread, while Eldric's tracking skills are unmatched.
